feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 2155 201 1954 100
TR 1997 172 1825 84

View All Apps

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Tap Roulette - Random Picker
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺29,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺29,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Tap Roulette is a fun party game, random picker, and decision maker for friends. Can't decide who should do something? Let Tap Roulette choose! Everyone places a finger on the screen and taps Start. The app will randomly select one player, and the chosen person must complete the challenge or punishment. Perfect for parties, gatherings, or anytime you need a quick random decision. Features - Supports an unlimited number of players - Fast and fair random selection - Multiple sound effects to choose from - Elegant, simple, and easy-to-use design - A thrilling party roulette experience with friends Note - iPhone supports up to 5 fingers at the same time - iPad supports up to 11 fingers at the same time

entry.title: Seoul Exorcist 1111: Roguelite
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺249,99 → ₺149,99 [₺40,00 ~ ₺299,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺149,99

In-App Purchases

  • 200,000 x Coins：₺499,99
  • 80,000 x Coins：₺249,99
  • 40,000 x Coins：₺149,99
  • 10,000 x Coins：₺49,99

Application Description

Think Fast, Strike Faster! As the ultimate exorcist, choose your attacks wisely, upgrade combat deck, combine traits and items, and save the cursed souls—before death finds you. ▪ Real-Time Turn-Based Combat Enemies react the moment you make a decision—! Fast, tense action with every move. ▪ 4 Characters with Unique Strategies Each with 8 uniques attack types, exclusive animations, and 2 passive traits. Adapt your playstyle for every run. ▪ Time Limit - Think Fast, Strike Faster! You have just 7 minutes to defeat all enemies in each run. You've been relentlessly trained for this moment. ▪ Item & Trait Combinations Strategic synergies that activate automatically during battle. Timing and adaptability are the keys to victory! ▪ Roguelite Clear all 7 maps and the boss in a single run—or get reset! But clearing the same map 3 times unlocks progress. Collect coins, build a stronger deck, and dive back in! ▪ 12 Languages Supported  Korean, English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French, German, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, Brazilian Portuguese, and Russian. ▪ Offline Game All data is stored locally. No network required. Be Aware. Uninstalling the app will erase saved data. ▪Discord https://discord.gg/UaZApdWG93 ▪For inquires / bug report snowgames0629@gmail.com

entry.title: Dungeon and Puzzles
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺149,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺149,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

Application Description

-- Awards: ● 2021 BitSummit THE 8th BIT: Official Selection ● Busan Indie Connect 2020: Excellence in Casual ● Bahamut 2020 ACG Creation Contest: Bronze Award About: Dungeon and Puzzles is a game that challenges players' 2D spatial perception and logical thinking. A player can use a sword to attack monsters, or a bow and an arrow to destroy enemies from afar. Pushing the obstacles back with a shield and pulling the monsters with a pair of special gloves. There are 150 handcrafted rooms in the dungeon. Players will have to get a better understanding of the game to solve the puzzles and clear the rooms. To beat the puzzles with fewer moves, achieving advanced goals, players will have to try different tactics and move combinations to find an optimized solution for the room. Sometimes a player would need to put the old solution aside and take on a new perspective towards the problem, reexamine and rethink before making a move. Features: ● Dungeon + Puzzle + Sokoban ● 150 handcrafted rooms ● Fantasy themed pixel art ● Non-linear dungeon map -- ● Follow us on Twitter https://twitter.com/nekolyst ● Like us on Facebook https://www.facebook.com/Nekolyst ● Join our Discord server https://discord.gg/A7Sss9d

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Neo Monsters
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺49,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • 13 Gems：₺399,99
  • 1 Gem：₺49,99
  • 6 Gems：₺199,99
  • 48 Gems：₺1.499,99
  • 74 Gems：₺2.299,99
  • 150 Gems：₺3.999,99
  • 28 Gems：₺799,99

Application Description

Become a Legend! Capture over 3000 Animated Monsters and Duel in Real-Time PvP! Form your team and battle for victory! Capture, train, and evolve to become the champion in one of the biggest monster battling RPGs! Neo Monsters is an addictive strategy RPG that features epic 4v4 battles between two teams of up to 16 monsters. The unique turn-based battle system allows you to come up with powerful chain strategies by combining hundreds of abilities. Hunt down the strongest monsters and harness their power, then take the battle online to dominate in exciting PvP battles and leagues! Are you ready to take the challenge? ▶Features: ● Build your Monster Collection • Capture and evolve over 1000 fully animated monsters! • Train your monsters and unleash their deadly potential. • Collect evolution ingredients to create the ultimate power! ● Form a Battle Strategy • Build the ultimate team of up to 16 monsters. • Defeat your opponents in epic turn-based 4v4 battles! • Create devastating combinations from hundreds of abilities. ● Become the Champion • Conquer six Leagues and take on the Grand Champion in 60+ hours of adventure! • Explore multiple islands and dungeons on your journey. • Follow the story to uncover the truth behind your late uncle’s atrocity. ● Take the Battle Online • Duel players from around the world in PvP leagues! • Complete 100+ online missions. • Take on weekly updated events to unlock big rewards. Follow us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NeoMonstersOfficial/ Join the Neo Monsters community: http://www.neomonstersforum.com/ Issues or questions? Contact our support: neomonsupport.gameplay@zigzagame.net Terms of Service: https://www.zigzagame.com/terms/ Privacy Policy: https://www.zigzagame.com/privacy-policy/

entry.title: 1942 Pacific Front Premium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → ₺19,99 [₺5,00 ~ ₺49,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺19,99

In-App Purchases

  • 25,000 Gold：₺89,99
  • 60,000 Gold：₺169,99
  • 700,000 Gold：₺4.999,99
  • 325,000 Gold：₺769,99
  • 125,000 Gold：₺349,99

Application Description

The battle continues after “1941 Frozen Front” – and this time, it’s all about naval warfare! Join the navy and fight to win the battle of your life! Own the battlefield and send your soldiers to the frontline. Military combat at its best! Choose the right tactics and use your commando to defeat the enemy! Lead the U.S. Army on their campaign or command the Japanese forces on their mission! Take out enemy alliances with infantry, artillery, tanks, warplanes, battleships and submarines and earn your stripes as an ingenious commander at the PACIFIC FRONT! *** MISSION BRIEFING *** FIGHT with powerful weapons like torpedos and bombs! TAKE OUT enemy positions with tanks and infantry! BOMBARD hostile headquarters with mighty bomber wings! SURPRISE the enemy with attacks from your submarine! EMPLACE your artillery in rough terrain! CLEAR beaches, lagoons and straits! AMBUSH the enemy! SUPPLY your army with goods and ammunition! DEFEND your aircraft carriers and battleships! Features: - Play without ads! - Turn-based strategy action set in WW2 - Thrilling campaigns and challenging missions - Historical U.S. and Japanese units - Infantry, artillery, tanks, warplanes, battleships and submarines for both fractions - Repairs, camouflage and fortification of units during the battles - Hot-hand multiplayer battles - Hex grid for the best overview possible - Detailed graphics and super-realistic sounds - Full tablet support Thank you for playing ‘1942 Pacific Front’! © HandyGames 2026

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Referee Simulator : Football
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → ₺9,99 [₺9,99 ~ ₺49,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺9,99

Application Description

REFEREE CAREER: SOCCER DECISION MAKER BLOW THE WHISTLE, MAKE THE CALL Step into the boots of a professional soccer referee in this unique career simulation game. Your decisions shape matches, championships, and your own career path. Start from the bottom of the referee ranks and work your way up to the elite professional level! * Call fouls, award penalties, and show cards * Manage player confrontations and maintain control * Use VAR technology to review critical moments * Time your calls perfectly to maintain match flow * Experience unique match scenarios each game COMPREHENSIVE REFEREE CAREER Begin your journey in the lower divisions (C Class) and climb your way to the prestigious Professional Class: * C Class: Amateur matches, perfect for learning the basics * B Class: Semi-professional matches with growing expectations * A Class: Professional matches with intense scrutiny * PRO Class: Elite matches with the highest pressure and rewards Your performance determines how quickly you advance through the ranks. Exceptional referees can fast-track their careers! MATCH AFTERMATH & REPUTATION Every decision you make affects your reputation in the soccer world: * View detailed post-match performance ratings * Read social media reactions to your most controversial calls * See how fans, players, and coaches respond to your decisions LEAGUE TABLE & CHAMPIONSHIP IMPACT Your decisions don't just affect individual matches - they can change entire championships: * Access league tables to see team standings * Understand the stakes of each match you officiate * Balance fairness with the intense atmosphere of crucial matches REFEREE DEVELOPMENT & CUSTOMIZATION Earn money from each match based on your performance and division level: * Visit the Referee Shop to purchase new equipments AUTHENTIC SOCCER EXPERIENCE Immerse yourself in a realistic soccer world: * Detailed Text-Based match simulations with dynamic player movements * Weather conditions that affect match flow and visibility VAR TECHNOLOGY MASTERY Modern soccer relies on 2D video review technology - master it to excel: * Make the final call after careful analysis * Review incidents from multiple camera angles * Make the final call after careful analysis REALISTIC PROGRESSION SYSTEM Your career advancement depends on consistent performance: * Complete season objectives to earn promotions * Risk demotion if your performance falls below standards Experience the beautiful game from a completely new perspective! REFEREE CAREER: SOCCER DECISION SIMULATOR puts you in control of the most important decisions in the sport. Your journey from amateur fields to professional stadiums begins with a whistle and a rulebook. Do you have what it takes to reach the top of the refereeing world? Download now and make the call! https://www.akinaksoydev.com/frs-privacy

entry.title: 20 Minutes Till Dawn:Premium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺249,99 → ₺149,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺249,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺149,99

Application Description

Survive the onslaught of an endless horde of monsters for 20 minutes! 20 Minutes Till Dawn is a roguelike, shoot'em up where you mow down endless hordes of monstrous baddies. 【Unique Builds Every Run】 In this roguelite survival game, select from a variety of upgrades to create a unique and overpowered builds every run. You can be a fire wizard, for example, and ignite monsters with every pump of your shotgun, or an agile ninja who controls magic knives to pierce your enemies. 【Select Your Hero】 Choose from a diverse selection of characters and weapons that offer a variety of gameplay experiences. 【Features】 *Over 80 different upgrades to choose from for a unique experience every run! *Wide cast of characters, with more to come post-launch. *Casual quick 10-20 minute play sessions, for busy gamers. *Rune System helps you become stronger 【Contact Us】 Discord: https://discord.gg/efTYchSsHZ Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Erabitstudios Twitter: https://twitter.com/erabit_studios

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Just a Simple Image Converter
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺399,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Experience the ultimate image transformation tool with our versatile Image Converter app. Seamlessly convert a wide range of image formats, including JPG, PNG, JPEG, GIF, PDF, WebP, and BMP, all in one convenient application. Whether you need to compress high-resolution images, switch formats for compatibility, or create versatile images for web use, our app has you covered. Enjoy the benefits of bulk image conversion, allowing you to process multiple images simultaneously, saving you time and effort. Our app ensures high-quality conversions with a user-friendly interface, making it suitable for both novice and experienced users. Key Features: Convert images from and to popular formats, including JPG, PNG, JPEG, GIF, PDF, WebP, and BMP. Bulk image conversion for efficient processing. Maintain image quality with high-resolution conversions. Streamlined, easy-to-use interface for a hassle-free experience. Save time and storage space by optimizing your image collection. But that's not all! We also offer seamless sharing options, allowing you to instantly send your converted images to friends, family, or colleagues. Easily share your masterpieces via email, messaging apps, or social media with just a few taps. Enhance your image management and sharing experience by downloading our Image Converter app today. It's the all-in-one solution for your image format conversion and sharing needs.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Speech to Text : Voice to Text
entry.id: Speech to Text : Voice to Text-tr-1784601435532
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺99,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Month：₺99,99
  • Year：₺499,99
  • 6 Months：₺229,99

Application Description

Speech to text : Voice to text is the powerful, real-time dictation solution. Based on the latest artificial intelligence and using a powerful speech recognition engine, This Dictation app accurately transcribes your speech to text in real time. The clean elegant design, along with the non-stop voice recognition and other features means you can relax and focus on your thoughts and content. Using our app , your words will be magically transcribed into text without your ever needing to touch a keyboard. Now you can use the power of your voice to create your words! Easily share your text and files later! (Works with Evernote, Dropbox, Google Drive, OneDrive, Facebook, Twitter, Snapchat, WhatsApp and other iOS supported sharing apps.) Whether you’re a professional writer, doctor, lawyer, disabled or somehow prevented from traditional typing, Speech to text : Voice to text app will swiftly solve your transcription problems and help you achieve your writing goals today! This fantastic speech-to-text app will allow you to do more with your iPhone/ iPad : ・Longer Record time: -DICTATE CONTINUOUSLY up-to 1 HOUR. ・Unlimited save & edits ・Transcribed text can be edited directly. ・Ideal for both individual and group transcription ・Background support for voice recognition. ・On-device Speech Recognition. • Voice recognition support for 59 languages and accents. • Share your text on social networks. • Copy your text to other apps. • Send your text as an email or text message. • Create PDF instantly with single click. • Convert text your notes, reports, letters into PDF instantly • Text Analysis using AI. ► Currently Supported Speech Recognition Languages: Arabic, Cantonese, Catalan, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Malay, Norwegian, Bokmål, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Shanghainese, Slovak, Spanish, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese. Technology: New iOS 14 Speech framework having state of the art accuracy, Faster ,Automatically adapts to the user Super easy: Simply click the microphone and start dictating. No need to login or register You can add new paragraphs, punctuation marks, smileys and other special characters using simple voice commands. Who Should Use Speech to Text : Voice to Text ? 1. Reporters: Interviews, conversations and more are easily recorded and transcribed, preserving the original audio. 2. Writers: Novelists, Authors, can all write in their true voice, capturing their moments of inspiration anytime, anywhere. 3. Professionals: Doctors, lawyers, managers, etc. Easily transcribe your daily tasks, notes, conference calls, letters and more! Your voice makes it happen! 4. Elderly or Disabled: Eliminates slow typing, commonly misspelled words or embarrassing composition mistakes. This app makes it convenient and easy to send and share your words with those you love. 5. Language Students: Text analysis using AI , Easily learn and master new words and languages by practicing dictation with speech to text app ! SUBSCRIPTION PRICING & TERMS We offer three auto-renewing subscription options: $1.99 / month $9.49 / 6 months - Save 20% $14.49 / 1 year - Save 40% The price corresponds to the same price segment , which are set in the “Apple App Store Matrix” for other currencies You can cancel a subscription anytime by turning off auto renewal though your iTunes account settings.This must be done 24 hours before the end of subscription period to avoid being charged. The cancellation will take effect the day after the last day of the current subscription. Terms of Service : https://voiceovermaker.com/termsofuse Privacy Policy: https://voiceovermaker.com/privacypolicy Support: Please email for any suggestions/feedback voiceovermakerz@gmail.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Labyrinth City
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺249,99 → ₺149,99 [₺149,99 ~ ₺249,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺149,99

Application Description

Labyrinth City: Pierre the Maze Detective is an adventure puzzle game for children and adults alike! Adapted from the award-winning children's illustration book series by IC4DESIGN and developed by Darjeeling, Labyrinth City takes you on a trip through a fantastic world of underground cities, hot-air balloons, tree-tops and haunted houses. Find your way through each interactive maze, engage with colorful characters, explore hidden pathways, unlock pieces of clues and solve the mystery along the way. 【The Story】 A new case has arrived for Pierre the Maze Detective! Mr. X has stolen the Maze Stone, which has the power to turn the whole Opera City into a maze. Help Pierre and his friend Carmen find their way through the mazes and stop Mr. X before it's too late! 【The Game】 You play as Pierre, Opera City's renowned maze detective, and you must retrieve the Maze Stone stolen by the notorious thief Mr. X! Without you, Opera City is doomed, as the Maze Stone has the power to turn everything around it into an intricate labyrinth. "Beautiful and cute puzzle games are fine and all," I hear you say, "but what about the challenge?". A fine question! In a maze, although there is only one true path to the exit, there are countless trails to hidden treasures and mini-games. So pay close attention while exploring Opera City and you will be pleasantly surprised. 【Features】 - Explore Opera City! Enter colorful worlds teeming with life and intricate details based on the best-selling children’s book series Pierre the Maze Detective by IC4DESIGN - Solve All Mysteries! More than 100 hidden objects and unique trophies to find, engaging puzzles and minigames to stimulate your brain - Interact With the Surroundings! Over 500 interactions possible with the characters, items, and background - Relive Childhood Memories! Each scene is based on a double-page illustration from the original work - Original soundtrack - Save the World! All levels are tied together by an overarching narration that will fill the detectives within us with purpose - Speaks Your Language! Available in English, Chinese (simplified and traditional), French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, and Russian

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Wreckfest
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺69,99 → ₺5,00 [₺5,00 ~ ₺69,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺5,00

In-App Purchases

  • Content Bundle 1：₺499,99
  • Getaway Car Pack：₺149,99
  • Content Bundle 2：₺399,99
  • Modified Monsters Car Pack：₺149,99
  • Steel & Wheels Pack：₺99,99
  • Off-Road Car Pack：₺149,99
  • Racing Heroes Car Pack：₺149,99
  • Rusty Rats Car Pack：₺149,99
  • Goofy Roofs Pack：₺49,99
  • American All-Stars Car Pack：₺149,99

Application Description

Burn rubber and shred metal in the ultimate driving playground! Wreckfest is jam-packed with upgrade and customization options. Whether you are preparing for your next demolition derby with reinforced bumpers, roll cages, side protectors and much more, or setting your car up for a banger race with engine performance parts like air filters, camshafts, fuel systems, etc., Wreckfest is shaping up to be the best combative motorsport game out there. • Unique Racing Experience – Exhilarating no-rules racing action with defining, once-in-a-lifetime moments that can be achieved only with a true-to-life physics simulation. Witness insane neck-to-neck fighting on high-speed circuits, face total destruction madness on crazy courses with intersections and oncoming traffic, or go for demolition dominance in derby arenas. • Awesome Cars – Our cars are old, banged up, patched together... They ooze style and character! From old American heavy-hitters to agile Europeans and fun Asians, you won’t find anything like this in other games. • Meaningful Customization – Change not only the look of your cars but also upgrade their body armor – Reinforce them with heavy iron that protects you from damage, but also adds weight, which impacts the cars handling. Modify your car to make a robust tank or a fragile but lightning-fast rocket, or anything in between! • Multiplayer – Wreck your friends in local multiplayer and take racing to the limit while chasing for demolition dominance! • Challenge modes – Have hilarious fun with crop harvesters, lawn mowers, school buses, three-wheelers and much more! • Career Mode – Battle for championships, earn experience, unlock new upgrades and cars, and become the all-time Wreckfest champion! © www.handy-games.com GmbH

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Otter - Food & Meal Diary
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺99,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Otter is a simple and beautiful food diary app that helps you track what you eat every day. No calorie counting, no complicated databases – just take photos, add notes, and reflect on your eating habits. ◆ WHY OTTER? - Clean, minimal design with an adorable otter character - Photo-based meal tracking – snap and save - No ads, no distractions - iCloud sync across all your devices ◆ FEATURES - Photo Food Journal Capture your meals with photos. A picture is worth a thousand calories – see what you eat at a glance. - Daily Notes Write about your day, how you felt, or what made each meal special. - Water Tracker Stay hydrated! Track your daily water intake with simple tap controls. - Weight Log Monitor your weight trends over time with easy-to-read records. - Timeline View Browse your food history in a beautiful timeline. See patterns in your eating habits. - Search & Stats Find past meals quickly and view your eating statistics. - iCloud Sync Your food diary stays safe and syncs automatically across iPhone, iPad, and Mac. ◆ A MINDFUL APPROACH TO EATING Otter doesn't judge. There's no calorie counting or strict diet plans. Just a gentle companion to help you become more aware of what you eat. You are what you eat – let Otter help you remember it. Questions? Contact us at OtterDietDiary@gmail.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: This Aint Even Poker, Ya Joker
entry.id: This Aint Even Poker, Ya Joker-tr-1784516027314
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺129,90 → ₺90,99 [₺90,99 ~ ₺129,90]）

All Price Information

Price：₺90,99

Application Description

Welcome to This Ain’t Even Poker, Ya Joker - a unique incremental idle clicker where you flip cards to earn money, grow your hand, buy new decks, unlock powerful upgrades, discover new cards, and more. Can you defeat the Jester and escape the carnival? Steam: Very Positive, 89% GROW YOUR HAND Buy new cards to increase your odds of hitting good hands. If you're rich enough, you can even break the rules and get over 5 cards. ESTABLISH DOMINANCE Even though the Jester doesn't like it, you can buy new decks of cards in order to play more hands at once. Use this to your advantage to grow those numbers even faster! GET UPGRADED Buy powerful upgrades using your hard earned coins, enabling you to progress quicker, open up new avenues, and take on the evil Jester! GO ON EXPEDITIONS Once unlocked, you can send your minions on expeditions to discover new otherworldy cards with powerful benefits. Upgrade these missions to provide even more powerful benefits as you progress. You can even unlock missions to destroy cards from your deck that you don't want, to ensure every hand is exactly how you want it. ASCEND TO GREATNESS Make a deal with the Jester to start over in exchange for Poker Chips (poker chips? But this ain't even poker...?), use those chips to buy even more powerful upgrades. ESCAPE THE HOUSE OF CARDS You're trapped in the Jester's domain, can you manage to defeat him and escape? Or will he keep you there, trapped forever in an endless cycle?

entry.title: Descenders
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺499,99 → ₺249,99 [₺249,99 ~ ₺499,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺249,99

Application Description

Descenders is extreme downhill freeriding for the modern era, with procedurally generated worlds, and where mistakes have real consequences. Will you lead your team to glory and become the next legendary Descender? • Procedurally generated worlds: Take on different jumps, slopes and hillbombs every time you play • Freestyle bike controls: Control every subtle movement of your rider, with an in-depth physics system made for slick whips and scrubs • Risk vs reward: Push your rider for massive scores and combos -- but bail too many times and you might lose it all • Build your Rep: A fully-featured online Rep system lets you show off your worth, and earn new bikes and threads • Become the next Descender: Can you survive the game in a single run, and reach the ranks of the legendary Descenders? Pick a Team, Become a Legend In Descenders, your team is your life. When you pick a side -- Enemy, Arboreal or Kinetic -- you'll be bound together with other players who choose the same side as you. Grab your bike, pick your team, and attempt to live up to the legend of your Descender. Will you join the die-hard, trick-frenzy ranks of Team Enemy, the proficient, off-road stylings of Team Arboreal, or the high-octane, speed-is-everything Team Kinetic? • Wear your team's colors and apparel with pride, and receive exclusive team gear • Your Rep points go towards your team's total Rep, and exclusive prizes are awarded to the top team • Gain access to your team's exclusive channel on the Descenders Discord server

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: LandscapePhotographyHelper Pro
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Official Model Library (Yearly)：₺199,99 → ₺49,99 [₺49,99 ~ ₺199,99]
  • Official Model Library (Monthly)：₺39,99 → ₺4,99 [₺4,99 ~ ₺39,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺499,99

In-App Purchases

  • Official Model Library (Yearly)：₺49,99
  • Official Model Library (Monthly)：₺4,99

Application Description

Landscape Photography Helper Pro helps photographers understand and anticipate the alignment of time, light, and celestial motion behind great landscape images. The real challenge is rarely pressing the shutter—it’s being in the right place, at the right time, facing the right direction. Landscape Photography Helper Pro is a powerful photography planning tool that allows you to evaluate light and celestial conditions before heading out, so every shoot begins with clarity rather than guesswork. You can use the timeline to preview the positions of the sun, moon, and Milky Way throughout the day. The 3D compass visualizes their direction and altitude in space, making light behavior intuitive instead of abstract data. With AR mode, you can preview the future positions of celestial objects directly in your real environment and understand how they align with terrain and surroundings. The app also displays important astronomical events such as sunrise, sunset, golden hour, blue hour, and twilight, and allows you to add key moments to your system calendar for reminders. The app provides an unlimited timeline, allowing you to predict celestial positions at any date and time. Advanced planning tools include star trail simulation, virtual viewfinder preview, sun and moon search, mountain identification, and comet position prediction. Comprehensive map planning tools allow you to evaluate shooting conditions at any location. You can view light pollution maps, weather forecasts, and save or reload shooting locations for future planning. Landscape Photography Helper Pro also includes a professional-grade 3D VR terrain prediction system. Built on real elevation data and independent of on-site sensors, it provides stable and repeatable predictions anywhere. You can simulate terrain occlusion, celestial paths, and real camera fields of view before arriving on location, helping you finalize compositions in advance. The app also supports drone composition simulation within the same real 3D terrain environment. You can simulate drone flight altitude and lens perspective before takeoff to verify whether an aerial composition works. The system displays real AGL (Above Ground Level) altitude and horizontal distance to your intended composition point, helping you evaluate height constraints and flight feasibility during the planning stage. This feature assists with composition planning only and does not determine airspace legality or restricted flight zones. An integrated drone database includes common consumer models and camera parameters, allowing simulations to more closely reflect real-world equipment performance. The latest version also introduces building alignment planning. Built-in architectural models can be placed anywhere on the map, scaled to real dimensions, and rotated to match their real orientation. This allows you to plan precise alignments between celestial objects and buildings directly inside VR and drone simulation scenes. You can also import custom .obj 3D models, allowing you to add your own landmarks and use them in planning scenes alongside built-in models. Landscape Photography Helper Pro is not just a tool for viewing information—it is a tool for making decisions. It helps you feel confident before shooting, calm on location, and efficient in creation. Let great photographs be the result of preparation, not chance. Privacy Statement: https://www.landscapehelper.cn/privacy License Agreement: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

entry.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: BfBB
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺169,99 → ₺14,99 [₺5,00 ~ ₺169,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺14,99

Application Description

Are you ready, kids? Play as SpongeBob, Patrick, and Sandy and show the evil Plankton that crime pays even less than Mr. Krabs. Want to save Bikini Bottom from lots of rampant robots with your mighty bubbles? Of course, you do! Want to underpants bungee jump? Why wouldn't you! The battle is on! Features: - Play as SpongeBob, Patrick, and Sandy and use their unique sets of skills - Thwart Plankton's evil plan to rule Bikini Bottom with his army of wacky robots - Meet countless characters from the beloved series - Faithful remake of one of the best SpongeBob games ever created - High-end visuals, modern resolutions, and carefully polished gameplay - Game Center support Thank you for playing SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle for Bikini Bottom! Get in touch with HandyGamesTM: www.handy-games.com Join us on Facebook: HandyGames Subscribe to our YouTube channel: HandyGames Check news on Twitter: @handy_games Follow us on Instagram: handygames Imprint: http://www.handy-games.com/contact/ © www.handy-games.com GmbH

entry.title: DEATH STRANDING DIRECTOR'S CUT
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺999,99 → ₺399,99 [₺399,99 ~ ₺999,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺399,99

Application Description

From legendary game creator Hideo Kojima comes a genre-defying experience, now expanded in this definitive DIRECTOR’S CUT. In the future, a mysterious event known as the Death Stranding has opened a doorway between the living and the dead, leading to grotesque creatures from the afterlife roaming the fallen world marred by a desolate society. As Sam Bridges, your mission is to deliver hope to humanity by connecting the last survivors of a decimated America. Can you reunite the shattered world, one step at a time? DEATH STRANDING DIRECTOR'S CUT on iOS includes a HIGH FRAME RATE, PHOTO MODE, and cross-over content from Valve Corporation's HALF-LIFE series and CD Projekt Red's Cyberpunk 2077. Stay connected with players around the globe with the Social Strand System™. Mac and iOS • Sign-in to iCloud and activation of iCloudDrive are required to play this product. • This product can be played offline, but a network connection is required to fully experience the Social Strand System™. Communication fees will be incurred during online play. Only for iOS version • When playing this product for the first time, you will be required to download additional data. You can start the game once you have downloaded approximately 13 GB, but additional downloads will occur as the game progresses, requiring a total of approximately 50 GB of downloads. Additional downloads will occur when additional language voice data is used. FAQs https://505.games/DSDCAppStoreFAQ

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad
